grain_bill: Pose 3 total ~5.300 kg: Pilsner malt, Wheat Blanc, Flaked Oats (split not specified)
adjuncts: Lactose at boil start (amount per kit pouch)
notes: Sparge with ~78C water to ~29L pre-boil volume.
Cool to ~80C for hopstand, then to ~23C for yeast pitch.
Bottle around day 14 after FG check.
Condition warm to carbonate; then cellar 13-17C.

steps.name: Heat mash water and mash in at 66C
steps.notes: Add grain bill (pose 3) and mix well. Start recirculation.

steps.name: Lauter and sparge to ~29L kettle volume
Boil 60 min
steps.notes: Add bitter hops (pose 4 Simcoe) and lactose at boil start.

steps.name: Cool to ~80C and run hopstand
steps.notes: Add aroma hops (pose 5 Citra/Mosaic), rest 20 min.

steps.name: Transfer to fermenter and pitch yeast
Dry hop on day 7
steps.notes: Add pose 6 (Mosaic/Citra/Simcoe) in sanitized hop bag or hopspider.
